title: [Control systems] Helmholz security advisory (AV26-274)
description: On March 23, 2026, CERT@VDE published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Helmholz myREX24V2   firmware versions 2.19.3 and prior
Helmholz myREX24V2.virtual   firmware versions 2.19.3 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
